Title: Unpatched Production Systems
Description: Critical and high severity vulnerabilities remain unpatched beyond SLA timelines on production servers and endpoints.
Mitigation Plan: Implement automated patch management with 14-day SLA for critical, 30-day for high. Deploy vulnerability scanning on weekly cadence.
Notes:
250115 - 12 critical vulns identified in quarterly scan.
250301 - Reduced to 4 after patch cycle.
250601 - New Java CVE affecting API servers, emergency patch scheduled.

Title: Vendor Insufficient Controls
Description: Third-party vendor lacks adequate security controls including background checks and information security policy.
Mitigation Plan: Issue formal risk acceptance memo to leadership. Require vendor to remediate within 90 days or evaluate alternatives.
Notes:
250414 - AccuPro questionnaire response reveals gaps.
250424 - Discussed with SC, emailed risk summary with recommendations.

Title: Lack of MFA on Critical Systems
Description: Multi-factor authentication not enforced across all critical systems and user accounts.
Mitigation Plan: Roll out MFA for all users by Q1 2025. Prioritize admin accounts and systems with access to confidential data.
Notes:
240806 - MFA implementation planned for fall 2024.
241112 - Delayed to Q1 2025.
250315 - MFA enforced for 85% of users. Remaining accounts in progress.

Title: Unencrypted Endpoints
Description: Staff laptops lack full disk encryption exposing confidential data if device is lost or stolen.
Mitigation Plan: Enable FileVault/BitLocker on all endpoints. Migrate to virtual desktop infrastructure as long-term solution.
Notes:
240108 - Need to verify encryption status on all devices.
240722 - Holding for VM implementation. Compensating control via contract language.
241201 - Contract language implemented. Probability reduced.

Title: Phishing Attack Success
Description: Employees fall victim to phishing attempts leading to credential compromise or malware infection.
Mitigation Plan: Conduct monthly phishing simulations. Require security awareness training quarterly. Deploy email filtering with advanced threat protection.
Notes:
250201 - Q4 phishing sim showed 12% click rate.
250501 - Q1 sim improved to 8% click rate after targeted training.

Title: No Disaster Recovery Testing
Description: Disaster recovery plan has not been tested in over 12 months creating uncertainty about recovery capabilities.
Mitigation Plan: Schedule DR tabletop exercise quarterly and full failover test annually. Document RTO/RPO for all critical systems.
Notes:
250301 - Last DR test was March 2024. Overdue.
250615 - Tabletop scheduled for July 2025.

Title: Excessive User Permissions
Description: Users retain access permissions beyond what is required for their current role violating least privilege.
Mitigation Plan: Implement quarterly user access reviews. Deploy role-based access control. Automate deprovisioning on role change.
Notes:
250110 - Access review identified 15 users with excessive permissions.
250401 - Remediated 12 of 15. Remaining 3 pending manager approval.

Title: Missing Security Logging
Description: Insufficient logging and monitoring on several production systems limiting incident detection and forensic capability.
Mitigation Plan: Deploy centralized SIEM. Ensure all critical systems forward logs. Establish 90-day retention minimum.
Notes:
250201 - Only 60% of production systems forwarding logs.
250415 - SIEM deployment in progress, target 90% coverage by Q3.

Title: Insecure API Endpoints
Description: Public-facing API endpoints lack rate limiting and input validation creating risk of abuse or data exposure.
Mitigation Plan: Implement API gateway with rate limiting. Add input validation and output encoding. Conduct API-specific penetration test.
Notes:
250301 - Penetration test identified 3 high findings on API.
250501 - 2 of 3 remediated. Rate limiting deployed.

Title: No Formal Incident Response Plan
Description: Organization lacks a documented and tested incident response plan.
Mitigation Plan: Draft IR plan aligned to NIST CSF. Conduct tabletop exercises quarterly. Establish incident commander rotation.
Notes:
250115 - IR plan draft completed.
250401 - Tabletop exercise conducted, identified communication gaps.
250601 - Plan updated with lessons learned.

Title: Shadow IT Usage
Description: Staff using unapproved SaaS applications to process business data without security review.
Mitigation Plan: Deploy CASB for shadow IT discovery. Establish expedited app approval process. Communicate acceptable use policy.
Notes:
250301 - Discovery scan found 23 unapproved SaaS tools.
250501 - 8 approved after review, 10 blocked, 5 pending.

Title: Inadequate Backup Verification
Description: Backups are running but restoration has not been tested to verify data integrity and recoverability.
Mitigation Plan: Implement monthly backup restoration tests for critical systems. Document and report results to leadership.
Notes:
250201 - Last verified restore was October 2024.
250601 - Restore test scheduled for July 2025.

Title: Lack of Network Segmentation
Description: Flat network topology allows lateral movement if an attacker gains access to any internal system.
Mitigation Plan: Implement network segmentation isolating production, development, and corporate environments. Deploy micro-segmentation for critical assets.
Notes:
250401 - Network assessment completed. Segmentation design in progress.
250701 - Phase 1 deployment targeting production isolation by Q4.

Title: Weak Password Policy
Description: Current password policy does not meet NIST 800-63 guidelines allowing weak or reused passwords.
Mitigation Plan: Update password policy to NIST 800-63 standards. Deploy password manager enterprise-wide. Enable breached password detection.
Notes:
250201 - Policy updated, pending approval.
250315 - Policy approved. LastPass deployment at 70%.
250601 - 95% adoption of password manager.

Title: Third Party Data Breach
Description: A critical vendor experiences a data breach exposing customer data shared with them.
Mitigation Plan: Maintain vendor incident notification requirements in contracts. Monitor vendor security posture. Ensure data minimization practices.
Notes:
250301 - Reviewed all vendor contracts for breach notification clauses.
250501 - 3 vendors missing clause, amendments in progress.

Title: Regulatory Non-Compliance
Description: Failure to meet regulatory requirements resulting in fines or enforcement actions.
Mitigation Plan: Maintain compliance calendar. Conduct annual compliance gap assessments. Engage external auditors for validation.
Notes:
250115 - Gap assessment completed against NIST CSF 2.0.
250401 - 4 gaps identified, remediation plans in place.

Title: Key Person Dependency
Description: Critical security knowledge concentrated in single individuals creating operational risk if unavailable.
Mitigation Plan: Document all critical procedures. Cross-train team members. Establish backup responsibilities for key functions.
Notes:
250201 - Identified 5 key person dependencies.
250501 - Documentation completed for 3 of 5. Cross-training in progress.

Title: Insecure Data Disposal
Description: No formal process for secure disposal of hardware and media containing confidential data.
Mitigation Plan: Implement certified data destruction for all hardware. Maintain chain of custody documentation. Include in asset management lifecycle.
Notes:
250401 - Inventory of hardware pending disposal: 12 devices.
250601 - Engaged certified destruction vendor.

Title: Cloud Misconfiguration
Description: Cloud infrastructure settings deviating from security baselines exposing resources to unauthorized access.
Mitigation Plan: Deploy cloud security posture management tool. Implement infrastructure as code with security guardrails. Conduct monthly configuration reviews.
Notes:
250301 - CSPM scan found 18 misconfigurations.
250501 - Remediated 14. Remaining 4 require architecture changes.

Title: Insider Threat
Description: Risk of intentional or accidental data exfiltration or sabotage by employees or contractors.
Mitigation Plan: Deploy DLP solution for sensitive data. Implement user behavior analytics. Conduct background checks on all staff with access to confidential data.
Notes:
250201 - DLP pilot on email gateway.
250501 - Expanded to cloud storage. UBA tool evaluation underway.
